message:
chore(beads): close undo/rollback issues and add FTUI migration epic plan

Close three completed issues: wa-5em.8 (undo execution), wa-5em.9
(rollback visualization tests), wa-nu4.3.2.14 (wa undo command). Move
wa-tp4.7 (suggestion display) to in_progress. Add 71 new issues
defining the FrankenTUI adoption program across 9 epics (FTUI-01
through FTUI-09) covering architecture, dependencies, runtime
ownership, adapters, view migration, input semantics, testing,
performance, and rollout/decommission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
